non_emergency_routing_rules.action: collect name, phone, address, and what they need
non_emergency_routing_rules.callback_window: within 2 hours during peak season or end of day in off-season

call_transfer_rules.callback_window_if_fails: within 2 hours during peak season or end of day in off-season

special_routing_rules.action: let callers know we're booking out several weeks and ask if they want to be added to the waitlist

special_routing_rules.trigger: calls about a property we did work for but they're a new owner
special_routing_rules.action: get the new owner's name and contact and tell them we'll pull up the system history

integration_constraints: do not create jobs in ServiceTrade
do not book anything on Google calendar directly
after_hours_flow_summary: handle emergency calls for active flooding situations
office_hours_flow_summary: collect name, phone, address, and what they need, then transfer to office
notes: use ServiceTrade for job management, be aware of seasonal business and high call volume during spring and fall
